subcodes.first_line: O Lord, grant us patience and forbearance, make firm our steps, and render us victorious over those heedless souls who have turned aside from Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب افرغ علینا صبرا و ثبت اقدامنا و انصرنا علی القوم الغافلین الذین اعرضوا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
